strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role aligns with required AI skills
Strong testing culture (TDD, Selenium courses, Fluent-Asserts library)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is older (robotics/orchestration tools)
Cloud platform experience narrow — AWS CDK only, no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond self-hosted
response.justification: Candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work, a clear testing-first mindset, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience that maps directly to a required skill. Gaps around Nest.js and Kotlin are real but learnable for an engineer with this breadth across languages and stacks, and the polyglot history (D, Java, C++, Swift, PHP) suggests fast ramp-up. Cloud/Kubernetes exposure is present but not deep, which is a minor concern rather than a blocker.
